description: §23.5.3 / §23.5.7 — a `capabilities=[…]` list containing a token outside the closed v1 vocabulary (`teleport`) fires E-FOREIGN-CAPABILITY-UNKNOWN (Error). Because the value is special-parsed as a capability-token LIST (not a general expression), the unknown token gets the HONEST capability-vocabulary error — NOT the pre-impl-wave misleading fatal E-SCOPE-001 (which treated `teleport` as an undeclared scope ref).
rationale: §23.5.3: the v1 capability vocabulary is CLOSED; an unrecognized capability token SHALL be a compile error (E-FOREIGN-CAPABILITY-UNKNOWN, §23.5.7). The honest code names the vocabulary; E-SCOPE-001 (the token-as-scope-ref misparse) MUST NOT fire.
